puzzle.title: The Keeper of the Gate of the Rising Sun
puzzle.intro: Throughout the Quran, certain souls traverse the earth leaving trails of wisdom and wonder. One such figure traveled to the furthest points of creation—where the sun rises and sets, where a barrier holds back chaos itself. This servant of Allah was granted a kingdom that none would ever possess again. Through three distinct journeys, this individual's purpose became clear. Can you identify this legendary wanderer from among the shadows of history?
clues: I was granted authority by the Most Merciful to rule over the earth in a way no one else has ever achieved.
I traveled westward until I reached the place where the sun sets, finding it setting in a murky spring, and I witnessed a people there.
I journeyed eastward until I reached the place where the sun rises, finding it rising upon a people for whom We had provided no shelter from it.
I journeyed between those two extreme points until I arrived at a valley between two mountains, where I found a people who could barely understand speech.
I found on the mountain two hard barriers of iron reaching to right and left, and between them, a narrow passage. These people asked me to break through the barrier holding back chaos.

I took my provision and said: 'When the barrier breaks through, this will be a clear separation between us and this people.' And when the appointed time arrived, I watched as the barrier was finally breached.

identity.label: Who Am I?
options: Dhu al-Qarnayn
Prophet Sulayman
Prophet Ibrahim
The King of Ghassaniyah
Dhul-Qarnain the Wanderer

trial.label: Trial/Event
options: Breaking through the iron barrier for the people of Yajuj and Majuj
Building the Ship under the command of a prophet
Constructing a temple in Jerusalem
Crossing the Red Sea with the believing people
Constructing a dam to protect a righteous nation
trial.answer: Breaking through the iron barrier for the people of Yajuj and Majuj

location.label: Key Element
options: The barrier of iron between two mountains
The ship anchored on a mountain
The sacred house of worship in Jerusalem
The river in the land of Egypt
The well of blessings in Madyan
location.answer: The barrier of iron between two mountains

outcome.label: Outcome
options: The barrier was breached when the appointed time came, and chaos poured forth
The disbelievers were drowned while the believers were saved
The righteous were guided to eternal paradise
The city was destroyed by a screaming wind
The idols were shattered and the people repented
outcome.answer: The barrier was breached when the appointed time came, and chaos poured forth

puzzle.arabic: قَالُوا۟ يَـٰذَا ٱلْقَرْنَيْنِ إِنَّ يَأْجُوجَ وَمَأْجُوجَ مُفْسِدُونَ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ فَهَلْ نَجْعَلُ لَكَ خَرْجًا عَلَىٰٓ أَن تَجْعَلَ بَيْنَنَا وَبَيْنَهُمْ سَدًّۭا
puzzle.verse: They said, "O Dhul-Qarnayn, indeed Gog and Magog are [great] corrupters in the land. So may we assign for you an expenditure that you might make between us and them a barrier?" (18:94)
